title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data to enable robots to understand and predict physical environments. It forms part of NVIDIA's integrated stack for physical AI alongside Vera and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot platform.
